category_sources: Official Gauche homepage says it is an R7RS Scheme implementation developed as a handy script interpreter.
source_facts.description says Gauche is an R7RS Scheme implementation.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title is Gauche - A Scheme Implementation.
docs_sources: Official Gauche homepage navigation includes Document and the site is source_facts.homepage.
Official homepage is the main project documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/shirok/Gauche; per instruction repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official Gauche homepage says it targets scripting, quick startup, system interfaces, and multilingual support.
source_facts.description identifies an R7RS Scheme implementation and script interpreter.
